title: mallotus japonicus
intro: Mallotus japonicus, also known as Japanese mallotus, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Mallotus japonicus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment for its medicinal uses.
